Searchscope
Alpha programme

Welcome aboard

Your search operation, in one workspace.

Searchscope brings together your Google Search Console data, a technical crawl of your website, AI analysis, demand and trend data, competitor intelligence and the wider web. It surfaces your biggest opportunities, prioritises them by impact, and recommends exactly what to do next.

Most search teams spend more time interpreting data than fixing problems. Searchscope is built for in-house marketing teams, SEO professionals and agencies who want to make better decisions, faster.

Open Searchscope → Questions? Email Stu

Your account is ready. Everything below is live in your workspace.

Inside the platform

Six instruments, one operation.

A quick tour of what you will find when you log in. Every screen below is your actual workspace, already connected and analysed.

01 · Data pipeline

Your data, read by seven analysers

Searchscope connects to your Google Search Console data and crawls your website. Seven analysers read both and produce scored, judged findings: what is wrong, why it matters, and a recommended fix for each.

Add optional Business Context in Settings, covering your product, audience, locations and tone of voice, and it feeds every output and suggestion.

Pre-configured for you: no pipeline setup needed

02 · Workspaces

Findings you can act on

Each analyser has its own workspace: opportunities within striking distance of page one, content that is decaying, pages competing with each other, structured data gaps, internal link fixes and more.

Every finding carries its evidence, an impact estimate, and an AI recommendation you can generate on demand.

03 · Intelligence hub

Your strategic command centre

Monitor your own search performance, see the wider Competitive Landscape, and explore search Demand and Trends for your market.

Then talk it through with the Strategic Advisor: an AI chat with context of everything the tool is connected to, from your GSC data and analyser findings to competitors, business context and objectives.

04 · Strategic advisor

Ask anything, grounded in your data

Performance reads on any page, prioritisation calls, next steps: the Advisor answers with your real numbers and can hand work straight to the Content Studio.

05 · Brand & AI visibility

How AI search sees your brand

Searchscope tracks whether ChatGPT, Perplexity and AI Overviews mention or cite your brand and pages, combined into a visibility score you can track over time. Fifty prompts are pre-loaded for you, across brand and non-brand, and you can add your own.

The Campaign Radar watches your competition for backlink bursts, the fingerprint of PR campaigns: what earned the links, who linked, and how to counter via the PR Strategist.

06 · Content studio

From finding to brief to draft

Start from a finding in any workspace, or just describe what you need. The Content Studio scrapes the live SERP for your country, reads the top competitors, and uses that evidence to generate a content brief or a full draft.

07 · Reporting

Reports shaped for the reader

Turn everything Searchscope runs on into tailored reports, formatted for the recipient: marketing, technical, executive, or your client.

You shape this

Your feedback is the roadmap.

As an early alpha user, what you notice decides what we build and fix next. If something is confusing, broken, missing, or great, we genuinely want to hear it.

Email Stu directly

In the app

Use the Feedback pop-out on the right edge of every screen: report a bug, flag confusion, suggest an idea, or celebrate a win. You can attach a screenshot and capture the session.

By email

Anything bigger, or anything you would rather talk through: stu@growthmindedmarketing.com

The alpha phase

What we are listening for.

Four questions guide this phase. If your experience speaks to any of them, that is exactly the feedback we need.

  • Is it insightful?Does Searchscope feel helpful when analysing your search data, your website and your competitors?
  • Is it accurate?Are the findings and recommendations suitable, correct and actionable for your site?
  • Does it move the needle?When you apply a suggested change, does it have a measurable impact?
  • What is strong, what is weak?Which parts of the tool-set earn a place in your week, and which fall flat?

Ready when you are

Go find something big.

Your workspace is connected, analysed and waiting. Log in, open your first workspace, and see what Searchscope found.
